test.doc: TASK 2: Use API users 6-10 (index 5-9) to overwrite table rows 6-10. For each row: replace all fields, then verify name, email, and all details.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
